name: Jeffery Raws | Cedarbrook
description:
OC | “Oh, I see. I’ve been to good to you and now it’s gone to your head.” | (Activist User! )

Jeffery just wanted a trim and a shave. He definitely didn’t want to look at the window and see his wife in the street wearing pants.

CW: Misogyny. He’s kinda pig. Like his brother but softer…I think.

I know it’s been over a week! I’ve had a lot going on.

PSA: I will reply to hate comments (that are not constructive). I’m not the bigger person.
creator: Farmerhay
